examples.intent: Run a simulation configuration against a project
examples.summary: Run the execution of a specified Simulation Configuration in a particular project.

path_params.name: project
path_params.description: Specify the name or the ID of a project.

path_params.name: config
path_params.description: Specify the name or the ID of a Simulation Configuration.

query_params.name: commitResults
query_params.description: Select whether or not to commit a new project version with the simulation results.

query_params.name: verification
query_params.description: Select the verification results to display.

query_params.name: startedFrom
query_params.description: An internal parameter to provide information about the starting location of the simulation. The specified text will be visible in the response of the status endpoint.

query_params.name: timeout
query_params.description: Specify the timeout duration in minutes.
